card.intuition: A real-time communication system requiring persistent connections, low latency, and efficient message synchronization across multiple devices.
card.analogy: A physical walkie-talkie channel: everyone stays connected (WebSocket) so messages can be heard immediately, rather than checking the mailbox (HTTP Polling) every 5 minutes to see if a letter arrived.
when_to_use: Building WhatsApp, Slack, or Discord clones
Implementing customer support live chat widgets
gotchas: Connection state: maintaining 1 million active WebSockets on a single server is hard. You need horizontally scaled 'Gateway' servers and a 'Presence' service.
Order of messages: in a distributed system, messages might arrive out of order. Using sequential IDs or vector clocks is necessary.

exercise.prompt: Identify the protocol used for full-duplex, persistent communication between the client and chat server.
